title: THERAPY SERVICES - 211info
text: MINDFUL THERAPY PACIFIC NW THERAPY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health services for individuals, couples, and groups. Therapists are trauma-informed, attachment-focused, somatically-trained, and Hokomi-based. Offers in-person and telehealth sessions. Does not provide crisis services. 4055 SW Garden Home Road Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Weekend or evening sessions may be available upon request. Email (503) 766-4000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 766-4000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Offers sliding scale fees. Accepts OHP, CareOregon, Regence Blue Cross Blue Shield, United, Optum, Providence, Pacific Source, Moda, Aetna, Cigna, and Kaiser Permanente insurance plans. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, French AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 44 Services: Conjoint Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MINDFUL THERAPY PACIFIC NW
